description: You are a sales operations analyst preparing the quarterly business review. Using the file sales_data.csv located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\sales_data.csv, build a two-page Power BI sales KPI dashboard and save it as Sales_KPI_Dashboard.pbix on the Desktop (C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\). The report must feature two pages named exactly 'Overview' and 'Regional Detail'. The 'Overview' page must include a Card visual for total Sales_Amount, a Card visual for total Quantity_Sold, and a Donut chart showing Sales_Amount broken down by Product_Category. The 'Regional Detail' page must include a Clustered Bar Chart showing Sales_Amount by Region with Sales_Rep as the legend, and a Slicer for the Sales_Channel column. The data model must include two DAX measures named exactly Total_Revenue (sum of Sales_Amount) and Total_Units (sum of Quantity_Sold). Login as Docker (no password required).
